title: Elmer's Colour Changing PVA Glue | Blue to Purple | 147 ml | Washable & Kid Friendly| Great for Making Slime | 1 Count
features: Colour-changing glue that magically transforms from blue to purple when exposed to sunlight
Watch in amazement as your slime creations change colour in daylight
Washable with soap and water for easy, stress-free cleanups
Child-friendly formula that’s made for kids (not for children under three years)
Perfect for getting creative at home or in the classroom
description: From the manufacturer Elmer's Colour Changing Glue Watch it Transform in the Sun Discover the magic of slime with Elmer’s Colour Changing Glue that transforms from one colour to the next when exposed to sunlight! It’s child-friendly*, flexible when dry, and washable with soap and water, so it’s easy to clean up and great for kids. They’ll have fun adding it to their painting, decorating, and gluing projects. They can even use it to make colour changing slime just by mixing it with bicarbonate of soda and contact lens solution, or Elmer's Magical Liquid activator. Check out how to make colour changing slime below! *Not suitable for children under 3 years. At a Glance… Glue changes colour when exposed to sunlight or UV rays Washable, child-friendly and flexible when dry Ideal for slime, arts and crafts projects Recipe: Elmer's Colour Changing Slime - Ingredients 1 x Elmer's Colour Changing Glue bottle (147 ml) 1 x Elmer's Magical Liquid bottle (68 ml) Start with Glue Pour 1 whole bottle of Colour Changing Glue into a bowl Add Elmer's Magical Liquid & Stir Add a splash of Magical Liquid and mix slowly until slime begins to form, gradually adding more liquid until whole bottle is used Remove & Knead Take slime out of bowl and begin kneading with both hands. Adult supervision required. SaveProject not appropriate for children under the age of 3 years. Thoroughly wash hands before and after making and playing with slime. Ingredients Step 1 Step 2 Step 3 Transforms in Sunlight Once you've made your slime, expose it to the sun and watch it change colour! Simply remove from the sun to restore it's original colour. Use a small LED light to draw or write directly on your slime, or partially block the sun with your hand to make fun patterns. Washable for Easy Clean Up Created with parents and teachers in mind, Elmer's Glue is child-friendly and washable for simple cleaning. Designed with a non-runny formula, Elmer's is a stress-free way to add excitement to art and slime projects. Choose Your Glue Elmer's Colour Changing Glue comes in Yellow to Red and Blue to Purple colour options for hours of endless fun.
